name: larena/licensing
description: Runtime licensing layer that decides which package, bundle and capability features are available to a site, with signed entitlement snapshots, trial restrictions, subscription/expiration policies, environment-aware licenses, limits and explainable locks.

scripts.analyse: @php -r "echo \"No static analysis targets in enforcement baseline.\\n\";"
scripts.validate:larena: @php -r "foreach ([".larena/spec-ref.json",".larena/launch-context.json"] as $f) { if (!is_file($f)) { fwrite(STDERR, $f." missing\\n"); exit(1); } } echo \"Larena metadata ok.\\n\";"
scripts.evidence:check: @php -r "foreach (["docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/README.md","docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/file-map.json","docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/graph-sync-proposal.json","docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/independent-review.md"] as $f) { if (!is_file($f)) { fwrite(STDERR, $f." missing\\n"); exit(1); } } echo \"Evidence ok.\\n\";"
